---
title: "Rachel Deedes"
---

## Rachel Deedes

**Dates:** (1851-1942)

### Description

member of the Gosling Society

### Biography

The daughter of the Rev. Charles Deedes (1808-1875), Rector of Bengeo, Herts., and Letitia Pleydell Bouverie, she married (1888) the Rev. H. Moody, Rector of Bentley, Hants.   She was a Gosling in 1870, alias unknown. [LG 1965]

### Letters

- Letter from [10 July 1870]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
